overall.description: Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a vehicle journey through Night City. The clip starts with the car passing under a concrete overpass, stopping at the Sequoia Street intersection for pedestrians, then turning right and driving through an industrial district toward Manzanita Street, with desert mesas visible in the background under warm golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane street passing under concrete overpass

events.description: entering covered area beneath concrete overpass, lighting dims significantly
exiting overpass back into open street with direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: driving forward under the concrete overpass, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadow and back to light

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass with red neon accent lights underneath
large illuminated billboard with colorful graphics and text
multi-story commercial building with weathered facade

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives beneath a massive concrete overpass, transitioning from bright golden hour sunlight into shadow and back out again. The environment features urban commercial buildings and a large digital billboard on the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with overhead street sign and pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: arriving at Sequoia Street intersection, stopping at red traffic light
traffic light changes from red to green
vehicle accelerates forward through the intersection as pedestrians clear the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: stopped at the red light at Sequoia intersection, waiting for pedestrians to finish crossing before accelerating through on green

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street from left to right during the red light phase

entered.detail: large red overhead street sign with white text reading 'Sequoia'
overhead metal structure supporting traffic signals and street signs
painted white pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
large industrial warehouse structure with metal facade

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at the Sequoia Street intersection during a red light, allowing pedestrians to cross the wide street. The overhead gantry displays the street name prominently. After the light turns green, the car accelerates through the intersection as the last pedestrians clear the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial commercial street with mixed warehouse and retail buildings

events.description: vehicle executes a right turn at the intersection
entering industrial district with visible construction scaffolding and warehouse buildings

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and accelerating along the industrial street, passing pedestrians on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking along the sidewalk near the corner as the vehicle turns

entered.detail: large blue industrial warehouse building with multiple windows and weathered paint
metal scaffolding structure on building under construction
large red rock mesa formations visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: After turning right at the intersection, the vehicle drives through an industrial area characterized by warehouse buildings and construction scaffolding. The landscape opens up to reveal desert mesas in the background, transitioning from dense urban to industrial-edge environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert-edge highway approaching intersection with mountainous backdrop

events.description: landscape opens up to reveal expansive desert terrain with red rock formations

agents.ego_description: driving straight along the multi-lane road toward the Manzanita intersection with increasing speed

entered.detail: overhead street sign with white text reading 'Manzanita' on red background
large red rock formations and desert landscape dominating the left side
elevated highway ramps and overpasses in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues driving along the open highway toward the Manzanita Street intersection, with expansive desert red rock formations becoming prominent on the left side. The environment transitions from industrial buildings to open desert terrain with distant highway overpasses visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey that transitions from the dense urban core of Night City into an expansive industrial fringe bordering a desert landscape. It begins by driving beneath a massive concrete overpass, flickering between bright golden hour sunlight and deep shadow past commercial buildings and a large digital billboard. As the vehicle reaches the Sequoia Street intersection, it pauses for pedestrians under a prominent street gantry before accelerating forward and turning right. The scene then shifts into an industrial district filled with warehouses and construction scaffolding, where the urban density gradually gives way to a vista of distant desert mesas. Finally, the camera moves along an open highway toward Manzanita Street, as the industrial buildings recede to reveal prominent red rock formations and distant overpasses under the warm glow of the horizon.
